element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core progression mechanic - holding fire button charges shot; powers up subsequent weapons
Coil/Jet/Marine modes unlock access to otherwise inaccessible areas; weapon power limited
Strategic weapon selection - each stage/boss weak to specific weapons; limited ammo
Optional discovery; navigation tools for secret areas; limited weapon power
Random item drops (health/ammo/E-Tank); passive support NPC
Toad Man, Bright Man, Pharaoh Man, Ring Man, Dust Man, Skull Man, Dive Man, Drill Man - defeat order player-determined

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After all eight Robot Masters defeated
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Two separate sets of mandatory linear stages leading to Dr. Cossack confrontation
End-game challenge; Dr. Wily reveal as true antagonist

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating Robot Master and acquiring weapon
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Multi-stage non-linear exploration (8 selectable Robot Master stages) flowing into mandatory linear post-game gauntlets; tension escalates from experimental stage design (optional side corridors, hidden items) to enforced linear challenge corridors

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden adaptors and unused corridor design suggest deliberate side-path exploration; some areas accessible only with specific Rush modes or adaptors
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Unused corridor in Toad Man stage (rooms $18-$19) indicates developer intent for discoverable dead-end areas; palette-switching mechanics reveal hidden sprite-based platforms

difficulty_curve.early_game: Eight Robot Master stages presented in player-determined order; designed for experimentation with weapon matchups and optional discovery
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive complexity with weapon variety; Rush adaptation usage increases; optional adaptors require specific stage knowledge
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mandatory two-stage Cossack Citadel progression removes player ordering agency; linear design enforces specific path completion
notable_spikes: Transition from non-linear stage selection to mandatory Cossack Citadel linear stages
Wily Castle appearance following Cossack confrontation (final difficulty spike)
Cockroach Twin boss encounter in Cossack Citadel Stage 3 (exhibits Flash Stopper interaction bug in PRG0/PRG1)

notable_level_patterns.description: Non-linear stage selection paradigm; player chooses completion order; each stage thematically tied to Robot Master archetype (Toad/Bright/Pharaoh/Ring/Dust/Skull/Dive/Drill); encourages weapon strategy discovery through experimentation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Toad Man stage (contains unused corridor suggesting original optional path design)

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear mandatory stages replacing player agency; enforced sequence following Robot Master completion; two separate stage sets leading to Cossack confrontation
Wire Adaptor and Balloon Adaptor hidden in stages; requires stage knowledge or exploration to locate; enables access to hidden areas unavailable to standard traversal
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Distributed across multiple stages (specific locations not documented in sources)
